_comment: Creator OS jurisdictional-overlay function declarations for the Gemini API (developer function calling). Gemini emits a structured call; YOUR application executes the HTTPS request against the public endpoint and returns the result. Consumer 'Gems' CANNOT use these (no custom-tool surface) -- use the Gemini API or a hosted remote-MCP connector. ADVISORY only; never a legal or permitting determination; a genuine safety-vs-aesthetic conflict is for the authority having jurisdiction. Values behind ToS-limited code portals (exact setbacks) are not returned; cite the ordinance and verify locally.

function_declarations.name: geocode_address
function_declarations.description: Geocode a US street address to longitude/latitude (EPSG:4326) via the keyless U.S. Census geocoder. Advisory, rooftop-or-interpolated, not survey-grade. The app must call the Census endpoint and return coordinates.

address.description: One-line US street address, e.g. '809 E Amelia St, Orlando FL 32803'.

function_declarations.name: historic_district_at_point
function_declarations.description: Return which City of Orlando LOCAL historic district (if any) contains the point. If one is returned, exterior work needs a Certificate of Appropriateness (Orlando City Code Ch. 62 sec. 62.200) before a permit. Advisory only; the app calls the City ArcGIS endpoint (server-side point-in-polygon).

function_declarations.name: zoning_at_point
function_declarations.description: Return the City of Orlando zoning + overlays at the point (e.g. R-2B/T/HP = base district + Traditional City + Historic Preservation). Exact setback numbers are NOT returned (Ch. 58 code, ToS-limited) -- cite the code and verify with the City. Advisory only.

function_declarations.name: flood_zone_at_point
function_declarations.description: Return the FEMA National Flood Hazard Layer flood zone at the point (e.g. AE, VE, X), nationwide. Advisory only; NOT a substitute for an official FEMA flood determination or the stamped FIRM. The app calls the FEMA endpoint.
